text.title: Solution Assessment Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report celebrates wins and omits misses.
antipattern.fix: Require equal section depth for met + missed drivers; reject reports without missed-driver content.

antipattern.symptom: KPIs are reported without baseline values.
antipattern.fix: Force baseline column per KPI; reject if any baseline is null.

antipattern.symptom: Report ends with conclusions but no recommendations.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥1 actionable recommendation tied to a missed driver or KPI gap.
